case_title: MALLEN, CARRIE VS CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-05-2002, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO AUG-12-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY MALLEN, CARRIE AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CONTINUANCE REQUEST FILED BY PLTF. $10 FEE PAID. TO BE SIGNED BY COMMISSIONER.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN
CHALLENGE OF VENUE FILED BY DEFT. VENUE TO REDWOOD CITY, SAN MATEO COUNTY. NOTICE SENT TO ALL PARTIES.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHERNOSKY, MICHAEL OWNER LUXURY EUROPEAN DEFT'S MOTION TO DISMISS BECAUSE OF IMPROPER VENUE - GRANTED. CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE TO LET PLAINTIFF FILE IN PROPER COURT (SAN MATEO COUNTY). STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-12-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-06-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER KAPLAN RECUSES HERSELF.
